# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Currently, this repository is a static site and all versions are actively supported as is.
Because it does not utilize dynamic backend servers or database integrations, vulnerabilities are typically low-risk visual/layout bugs or static DOM issues rather than high-risk CVEs.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report (suspected) security vulnerabilities to `ovishkh` or via opening a private issue / security advisory on GitHub.

Do not publicly disclose the vulnerability until it has been verified and patched.

### What to include in your report:

- Type of issue (e.g. cross-site scripting, denial of service).
- The exact location the issue occurs (file names, lines of code, URL).
- Instructions on how to reproduce the issue.
- Potential impact.

We will endeavor to respond to your report within 48 hours.
